title: Visible-Ores(Advance)
description: This is a resource pack for mining
body:
### The resource pack enables luminous ore textures if the following mod is installed ###

> - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) by [PepperCode1](https://modrinth.com/user/PepperCode1)

### The resource pack enables options if the following mod is installed ###

> - [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) by [JFronny](https://modrinth.com/user/JFronny)

 ### Her is a small impression ###

> ![Gave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1v8NdMug/images/db8df37a6b531ee6204b01a833cdf601d6d1394e.png)
![Menu function](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1v8NdMug/images/b8e87308908fbcc872f48d398c1b2177e862be5a.png)
